# Synthetic Fixture: Assignment and Succession

Document marker: 채권양도 통지 / 승계집행문
Assignor: [ASSIGNOR_ORG]
Assignee: [ASSIGNEE_ORG]
Debtor: [DEBTOR_PERSON]
Assigned claim: [CLAIM_TOKEN]
Notice status: delivered
Succession authority: execution clause requested

Evidence summary:
- Assignment chain, notice, and succession authority must be modeled separately.
- Broken chain or missing notice creates a review item.
- Raw contract pages and party identifiers are replaced with placeholders.
